tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua(2,3): error TLUA2322: Type '1' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
  Source has 1 element(s) but target requires 2.
tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua(6,3): error TLUA2322: Type 'number, string, boolean' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
  Source has 3 element(s) but target allows only 2.
tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua(10,3): error TLUA2322: Type 'string, number' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
  Type at position 1 in source is not compatible with type at position 1 in target.
    Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua(14,3): error TLUA2322: Type 'number, string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua(19,3): error TLUA2322: Type 'void' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
  Source has 0 element(s) but target requires 2.
tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua(27,24): error TLUA2355: A function whose declared type is neither 'undefined', 'void', nor 'any' must return a value.
tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua(31,37): error TLUA1228: A type predicate is only allowed in return type position for functions and methods.
tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua(31,37): error TLUA100021: A type predicate cannot be part of a multiple return type.


==== tluaMultiReturnArityErrors.tlua (8 errors) ====
    function need2(): (number, string)
      return 1;
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '1' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Source has 1 element(s) but target requires 2.
    end
    
    function allows2(): (number, string)
      return 1, "a", true;
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number, string, boolean' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Source has 3 element(s) but target allows only 2.
    end
    
    function wrongTypes(): (number, string)
      return "a", 1;
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string, number' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type at position 1 in source is not compatible with type at position 1 in target.
!!! error TLUA2322:     Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    end
    
    function single(): number
      return 1, "a";
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number, string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    end
    
    // A bare return provides zero values against a pack that requires two.
    function bareReturn(): (number, string)
      return;
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'void' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Source has 0 element(s) but target requires 2.
    end
    
    // An all-optional pack allows returning nothing at all.
    function allOptional(): (number?, string?)
    end
    
    // A pack with required values must return.
    function mustReturn(): (number, string?)
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2355: A function whose declared type is neither 'undefined', 'void', nor 'any' must return a value.
    end
    
    // A type predicate cannot start a multiple return type.
    function badPredicate(x: unknown): (x is string, number) {
                                        ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1228: A type predicate is only allowed in return type position for functions and methods.
                                        ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100021: A type predicate cannot be part of a multiple return type.
      return type(x) == "string", 1;
    }
